summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Momentum Recap page production polish (iteration 217). All backend API tests (24/24) and frontend UI tests passed. Key validations: 'Re-engage Emory University' (no 'with'), clean secondary reasons without redundant prefixes, contextual ai_insights bullets, urgency note styled in gray italic (#94a3b8), momentum section label 'Where you're gaining traction', 3-line priority hierarchy, navigation working, mobile responsive at 390px.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Production polish testing complete (iteration 217). All requirements verified: 1) Top priority action is 'Re-engage Emory University' (NOT 'Re-engage with Emory University'), 2) Secondary reasons are clean without redundant prefixes (Stanford: 'Keep the conversation active this week', Florida: 'Send your next follow-up within 48 hours'), 3) ai_insights bullets are contextual (Florida: 'is heating up through active conversations', UCLA: 'is heating up after being recently added'), 4) Urgency note styled in gray italic (#94a3b8, fontStyle: italic, fontWeight: 400), 5) Momentum section label is 'Where you're gaining traction' (not 'MOMENTUM SHIFT'), 6) Top priority shows 3-line hierarchy (action bold → instruction → reinforcement lighter), 7) All navigation works (back button, priority clicks, momentum clicks), 8) Mobile responsive at 390px with all sections visible.
